/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc  -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -fstack-usage -O0 -g3 -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -T "/home/longvh12/portingrtu/g474_modbus_test/STM32G474XX_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=g474_modbus_test.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage
